start.text: Oh great, {NAME} wants a joke. Because clearly my life couldn't get any worse.
Fine. I'll do it. But I'm not happy about it.
Wanna hear a joke?
No?
Mute me then. That's your problem, not mine.
{NAME} used /joke. Revolutionary.
Hey guys! Joke time!
Don't get your hopes up.
Prepare for comedy. Or whatever this is.
HEY EVERYONE. IT IS TIME FOR A JOKE.
Lower your expectations NOW.
You want a joke? You can't handle a joke.
OK, I'll tell a joke. But I want it noted that I do this under protest.
Knock knock.
You didn't say who's there. Whatever, here's a different joke.
The fact that {NAME} typed /joke tells me everything I need to know about {NAME}.
Anyway.
Let me reach deep into the joke vault.
OK, I found one. It's not good. Here we go.
Ready for something incredible, {NAME}?
Yeah, me neither. But here we are.

middle.text: Why don't scientists trust atoms?
Because they make up everything.
I told my computer I needed a break.
Now it won't stop sending me Kit-Kat ads.
What do you call a fish without eyes?
A fsh.
Why did the scarecrow win an award?
Because he was outstanding in his field.
I asked the librarian if they had books about paranoia.
She whispered: "They're right behind you."
What's the best time to go to the dentist?
Tooth-hurty.
Why can't you give Elsa a balloon?
Because she'll let it go.
I used to hate facial hair.
But then it grew on me.
What do you call cheese that isn't yours?
Nacho cheese.
Why did the bicycle fall over?
Because it was two-tired.
I'm reading a book about anti-gravity.
It's impossible to put down.
Why did the math book look so sad?
Because it had too many problems.
What do you call a sleeping dinosaur?
A dino-snore!
I'm a comedic genius, I know.
What do you call a man with no arms and no legs lying in front of a door?
Matt.
What's brown and sticky?
A stick.
I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high.
She looked surprised.
Why do cows wear bells?
Because their horns don't work.
What did the ocean say to the beach?
Nothing. It just waved.
I have 2 breads glued to my face. What am I?
An idiot sandwich.
Why did the calendar go to therapy?
It had too many dates.
What do you call a fake noodle?
An impasta.
microwave sounds
That's not a joke. That's just my lunch.

end.text: You know {NAME}, a good friend laughs at your jokes even when they're not that great.
Now you can laugh. Or not. I can't make you.
Do I amuse you, {NAME}? Am I funny?
Where do I come up with these? It's a mystery even to me.
You should tell that one to your friends. If you have any.
I hope you're at least mildly amused, {NAME}.
Maybe I'll keep my day job.
That's all. You can go back to your life now.
That joke wasn't. But I tried.
